hook: The AI gave you a 7-step framework when you needed a 3-word answer.
caption:
The AI gave you a 7-step framework when you needed a 3-word answer.

This is the thing nobody talks about.

AI doesn't know if you're the type of person who wants the full breakdown — or just the answer so you can keep moving.

So it defaults to: comprehensive. Structured. Thorough.

Which sounds great until you're staring at bullet points 4, 5, and 6 thinking "I didn't ask for a semester course, I asked if I should send the email."

The fix isn't rephrasing your prompt every single time.

The fix is the AI already knowing you're a bottom-line-first thinker who gets decision fatigue from too many options and just needs a clear call with one sentence of reasoning behind it.

That's what a BootFile does.

It's a profile built around how YOUR brain actually processes information — so the AI stops writing for the average user and starts responding for you specifically.

Same question. Completely different answer.

The 7-step framework people? They exist. We built for them too. But if you read "step 1 of 7" and immediately felt your eyes glaze over — you know exactly what we're talking about.
